London Stansted Airport

Improving Baggage Handling Reliability

Home Industries Proof Resources Contact Assets

The Challenge

London Stansted Airport operates a complex baggage handling system that processes thousands of bags daily. Equipment failures disrupt operations and frustrate passengers.

Traditional maintenance schedules were reactive, leading to unexpected downtime and passenger inconvenience.

Our Solution

Samotics implemented real-time monitoring across critical conveyor belt motors and handling equipment. The system continuously analyzes electrical signatures to detect equipment degradation early.

Results

  • 35% reduction in unplanned downtime
  • Improved baggage handling reliability
  • Better maintenance planning and resource allocation
  • Enhanced passenger satisfaction through improved on-time operations
Request a Consultation
